wikipedia.title: Illinois
wikipedia.summary: Illinois is a state in the Midwestern region of the United States. It borders on Lake Michigan to its northeast, the Mississippi River to its west, and the Wabash and Ohio rivers to its south. wikipedia.title: Jefferson County, Illinois
wikipedia.summary: Jefferson County is a county located in the southern part of the U.S. state of Illinois. According to the 2020 census, it has a population of 37,113.
